#sprint-main.message: ⏰ *Scheduled Event*: Autonomous status check - system is healthy. Active tasks: 0.

🏁 *New Sprint Started!* Goal: "Build a full-stack Todo List application with a React frontend and Python FastAPI backend.

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: React 19, Vite, TypeScript, React Router, Axios, CSS Modules
- Backend: Python 3.12+, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, SQLite, Pydantic, Uvicorn

Project Structure:
todo-app/
├── frontend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   ├── App.tsx
│   │   └── main.tsx
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   ├── models.py
│   │   ├── schemas.py
│   │   ├── crud.py
│   │   ├── database.py
│   │   └── main.py
│   ├── requirements.txt
│   └── todo.db
├── README.md
└── docker-compose.yml

Features:
- Create, edit, delete, view todos
- Mark complete/incomplete
- Confirmation before delete
- Loading and error states
- Responsive modern UI
- Search and filter (All, Active, Completed)
- SQLite persistence

Todo Model:
- id
- title
- description
- completed
- created_at
- updated_at

REST API:
GET /todos
GET /todos/{id}
POST /todos
PUT /todos/{id}
PATCH /todos/{id}/toggle
DELETE /todos/{id}

Requirements:
- Modular, production-ready architecture
- Centralized API service on frontend
- TypeScript and Python type hints
- Pydantic validation
- SQLAlchemy ORM
- CORS configured
- Clean, reusable components
- Proper error handling
- README with setup instructions

Generate every required file with complete working code. The project should run immediately using:

Backend:
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn app.main:app --reload

Frontend:
npm install
npm run dev

Do not leave placeholders, TODOs, or incomplete implementations. please make sure to have seperate frontend and backend folder"
Hermes is analysing requirements…
